title: Episode 3 — Musk vs OpenAI (v16 weapon-kit)
description: Council debate on Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI's for-profit conversion. v16 doctrine: each character holds a pre-assigned 3-5 weapon arsenal (Tanaka=structural, Mercer=institutional, Kurogane=consequence-forward), Juliet runs Frost-Nixon recall pins. Topic: betrayed founding mission, or competitor weaponizing charity law?
